# SetFrame

> SetFrame is a founder-operated studio that builds websites and the business systems behind them for companies that run on inquiries, appointments and follow-up. Fixed price per project, agreed before work starts. Websites typically launch in two to four weeks; systems that handle replies, follow-up or paperwork add one to two weeks depending on scope.

## Key sections

- [Work](https://setframe.vercel.app/#work): One website concept shown as two prototypes, plus a scrolling strip of the systems SetFrame builds.
- [Services](https://setframe.vercel.app/#services): What gets built — websites that turn visitors into booked calls, instant-answer chat, and document/data automation.
- [Systems / Knowledge](https://setframe.vercel.app/knowledge): Plain-language guide to each system (Client Response System, Lead Capture, Booking Flow, Document Intake, Automation Hub, System Map), what each fixes, and a simple explainer of what SaaS means.
- [About](https://setframe.vercel.app/#about): What SetFrame is and who it's built for.
- [FAQ](https://setframe.vercel.app/#faq): Pricing, timelines, ownership after launch, and who SetFrame works with.
- [Contact](https://setframe.vercel.app/contact): Start a conversation about a project.

## Notes for agents

- SetFrame is a focus on financial and advisory firms, but not limited to them — any business that runs on inquiries, appointments and follow-up is a fit.
- Reach: Poland, Netherlands, and worldwide (remote).
- Pricing is fixed per project, not hourly.
- SaaS means software as a service: software you subscribe to that runs a job for you online, always on, with nothing to maintain.
- This file does not affect Google search ranking; it exists to help AI agents and answer engines describe SetFrame accurately.
